calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-02-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Matthew Mraule for (executor) Elvira Minor.

Counsel reported that the declaration has been filed this morning and presented an endorsed filed copy. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy McConico. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-30-2014 Continued To Aug-04-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Matthew Mraule for Elvira Miner. Jennifer Jaynes for (beneficiaries) Sean Hollitz, Peggy Hollitz & Ryan Hollitz.

Counsel reported that the matter has been negotiated. The accounting petition was continued to August 4, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of a declaration regarding how fees are being paid, the abatement and the terms/understanding of the agreement. The matter will be deemed under submission on that date.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-25-2014 Continued To Jul-09-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Second Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar May-27-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Matthew Mraule for Elvira Miner. Jennifer Jaynes for the Hollitz Family.

The Court noted that the petition for final distribution got filed. The status hearing is off calendar.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Apr-15-2014 Granted Per Written Order

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Mar-25-2014 Continued To Apr-15-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-06-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Matthew Mraule for Elvira Miner (Petitioner).

The Court is willing to grant the petition and bond is required in the amount of $582,000.00.
The matter was taken under submission. Mr. Mraule represented to the Court that USF has waived bond and that counsel for the three Hollitz beneficiaries agree to waive bond and that he requests to set bond at either $10,000.00 or $20,000.00. The matter was taken under submission for a signed bond waiver from USF and the three Hollitz beneficiaries. If the bond waivers can not be filed by Thursday, March 7, 2013, then the matter is continued to March 19, 2013.

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Ella Yip/ Nancy Bautista. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.
